display.purpose: Auth and landing hero only. Newsreader at clamp display size, light weight.

headline.purpose: Section and topic page titles. Newsreader at 1.75rem.

title.purpose: Card titles, modal titles, topic names. Newsreader at 1.25rem.

body-prose.purpose: AI explanations and long-form topic content. Newsreader at 16px, line-height 1.65, capped at 75ch.

body.purpose: UI body text: modal copy, descriptions, dashboard subtitles. Inter at 15px.

label.purpose: Buttons, badges, form labels, navbar, breadcrumb. Inter at 13px / 500 / +0.01em.

mono.purpose: Inline code, code blocks, KaTeX inline. JetBrains Mono at 14px.

extensions.fontLoading: CSS tokens name Newsreader, Inter, and JetBrains Mono directly. The app shell currently loads Geist variables for Tailwind defaults, so production font loading must explicitly provide the documented families or accept their fallbacks.

shadows.name: input-focus-glow
shadows.purpose: Border-edge focus glow for text inputs, textareas, and input-like containers. Pair with border-color rgba(157, 67, 55, 0.58).

shadows.name: modal-lift
shadows.purpose: Modal surfaces over the dimmed page. Soft, deep, low-chroma.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus on buttons, checkboxes, and compact controls. Text entry fields use input-focus-glow instead.

shadows.name: lamp-halo
shadows.purpose: Rare payment or subscription emphasis, paired with a low-opacity warm radial overlay. It reads as a reading lamp catching an active surface, not a general card shadow.

motion.name: fade-in-up
motion.purpose: Initial render of new messages and page sections. Translate Y 16px to 0, opacity 0 to 1.

motion.name: modal-pop
motion.purpose: Modal open. Scale 0.96 to 1, opacity 0 to 1.

motion.name: jumping-dots
motion.purpose: Tool-use indicator while the AI is searching student materials.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single chromatic action button. One per page, on the dominant action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 10px 20px; background: #7e3128; color: #ece5d6; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.01em; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #9d4337; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(126, 49, 40, 0.32); } .ds-btn-primary:active { box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost button. The shared Button component uses a transparent border; page-local ghost controls may use a cream hairline when they need a physical boundary.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 10px 20px; background: transparent; color: #ece5d6; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.01em; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms ease-out, border-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #2c2421; } .ds-btn-secondary--bounded { border-color: rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(126, 49, 40, 0.32); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Single-line text input. Hairline border at rest, restrained oxblood border glow on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 14px; background: #231d1a; color: #ece5d6; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.55; border: 1px solid rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); border-radius: 6px; outline: none; transition: border-color 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9a8f7e; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: rgba(157, 67, 55, 0.58); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(157, 67, 55, 0.28), 0 0 12px -8px rgba(157, 67, 55, 0.64); } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"] { border-color: rgba(207, 90, 82, 0.62); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(207, 90, 82, 0.25); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default container. Flat at rest, with a soft full hairline border. Optional hairline rule below the title separates heading from body.
components.html:
Cálculo II

12 topics · 3 completed
components.css: .ds-card { background: #231d1a; color: #ece5d6; border: 1px solid rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); border-radius: 10px; padding: 20px; transition: background-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-card:hover { background: #2c2421; } .ds-card-header { padding-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Newsreader, 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; color: #ece5d6; margin: 0; } .ds-card-meta { font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.55; color: #c4baa6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Topic Card (Active)
components.description: Signature component: a topic in the studying timeline. The current implementation uses a large sequence node, quiet vertical connector, oxblood active ring, subtopic dot list, and a completion checkbox with an expanding hover label.
components.html:
3

Limites e continuidade

  • definição formal
  • regras de cálculo
  • teorema do confronto

Nenhuma mensagem
components.css: .ds-topic-card { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 24px; padding: 24px; background: #231d1a; color: #ece5d6; border: 1px solid rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); border-radius: 10px; transition: background-color 200ms ease-out, border-color 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out; } .ds-topic-card--active { border-color: #7e3128; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #7e3128; } .ds-topic-node { width: 48px; height: 48px; flex-shrink: 0; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 9999px; background: #231d1a; color: #7e3128; border: 3px solid #1a1614; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #7e3128; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; } .ds-topic-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; padding-right: 40px; } .ds-topic-title { margin: 0 0 12px; font-family: Newsreader, 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; color: #7e3128; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-topic-subs { display: grid; gap: 10px; margin: 0 0 20px; padding: 0; list-style: none; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.55; color: #c4baa6; } .ds-topic-subs li { display: flex; gap: 12px; } .ds-topic-subs li::before { content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; margin-top: 0.65em; flex-shrink: 0; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); } .ds-topic-meta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 6px 12px; background: #1a1614; border: 1px solid rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #c4baa6; } .ds-topic-check { position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 20px; display: inline-flex; cursor: pointer; } .ds-topic-check input { position: absolute; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; } .ds-topic-check-box { width: 20px; height: 20px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #1a1614; border: 1px solid rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); border-radius: 4px; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-topic-check input:checked + .ds-topic-check-box { background: #7e3128; border-color: #7e3128; }

components.name: Chat Input
components.description: Signature component: bottom-of-screen multi-line chat input. Current implementation uses an 8px/12px padded surface, border-only focus glow, 200px max textarea height, and a 40px oxblood paper-plane icon button.
components.html: <form class="ds-chat-input" autocomplete="off"><textarea class="ds-chat-textarea" rows="1" placeholder="Type your message..."></textarea><button class="ds-chat-send" type="submit" aria-label="Send message"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M22 2 11 13"/><path d="m22 2-7 20-4-9-9-4 20-7Z"/></svg></button></form>
components.css: .ds-chat-input { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 0; padding: 8px 12px 8px 8px; background: #231d1a; border: 1px solid rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 24px 48px -16px rgba(26, 22, 20, 0.6), 0 0 0 1px rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); transition: border-color 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out; } .ds-chat-input:focus-within { border-color: rgba(157, 67, 55, 0.58); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(157, 67, 55, 0.28), 0 0 12px -8px rgba(157, 67, 55, 0.64); } .ds-chat-textarea { flex: 1; min-height: 24px; max-height: 200px; padding: 8px 16px; background: transparent; color: #ece5d6; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; border: none; outline: none; resize: none; } .ds-chat-textarea::placeholder { color: #9a8f7e; } .ds-chat-send { width: 40px; height: 40px; flex-shrink: 0; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #7e3128; color: #ece5d6; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-chat-send:hover { background: #9d4337; } .ds-chat-send:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(126, 49, 40, 0.32); }

components.name: Chat Messages and Markdown
components.description: Core study reading surface. Assistant prose uses Newsreader Body Prose; user messages use restrained desk-surface bubbles; material-search tool indicators make provenance visible.
components.html:
Vamos resolver pelo mesmo método dos seus slides.

ConceitoUso
LimiteAproximação
components.css: .ds-chat-assistant { max-width: 95%; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; color: #ece5d6; font-family: Newsreader, 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.65; overflow-wrap: anywhere; } .ds-chat-user { max-width: 85%; padding: 14px 20px; background: #231d1a; border-radius: 14px; color: #ece5d6; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; } .ds-tool-indicator { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; color: #c4baa6; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; } .ds-markdown-table-scroll { max-width: 100%; overflow-x: auto; margin: 1.15em 0 1.25em; border: 1px solid rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(35, 29, 26, 0.52); } .ds-markdown-table-scroll table { width: 100%; min-width: max-content; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; white-space: nowrap; font-family: Newsreader, 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.8889em; line-height: 1.45; } .ds-markdown-table-scroll th, .ds-markdown-table-scroll td { padding: 0.6em 0.8em; border-right: 1px solid rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); text-align: left; vertical-align: top; } .ds-markdown-table-scroll th { background: rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.055); color: #ece5d6; font-weight: 500; } .ds-markdown-table-scroll td { color: #c4baa6; }

components.name: Navbar
components.description: Top navigation. Eduh wordmark in Newsreader (no gradient), avatar dropdown on the right.
components.html: Eduh
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 56px; padding: 0 24px; background: #1a1614; color: #ece5d6; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); } .ds-nav-logo { font-family: Newsreader, 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 500; color: #ece5d6; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: -0.005em; } .ds-nav-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-nav-avatar { width: 32px; height: 32px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #231d1a; color: #ece5d6; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-avatar:hover { background: #2c2421; } .ds-nav-avatar:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(126, 49, 40, 0.32); }

components.name: Code Block
components.description: Quotation-style code listing on the cool code-surface. The only cool note in the palette.
components.html:
def limit(f, x0):
    return 'L'  # the value f approaches
components.css: .ds-code { margin: 0; padding: 16px; background: #262a2c; color: #ece5d6; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.55; border: 1px solid rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); border-radius: 6px; overflow-x: auto; } .ds-code code { font-family: inherit; } .ds-code-kw { color: #9d4337; font-weight: 500; } .ds-code-id { color: #ece5d6; } .ds-code-str { color: #d6a85a; } .ds-code-cm { color: #9a8f7e; font-style: italic; }

components.name: Toast (Success)
components.description: Bottom-right ephemeral notification. Current implementation uses tinted background, border, and text color. Leading icons are preferred for future expansion; side stripes remain forbidden.
components.html: Credits added to your balance.
components.css: .ds-toast { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; padding: 14px 20px; background: #1a1614; color: #ece5d6; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; border: 1px solid rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); border-radius: 10px; max-width: 24rem; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .ds-toast--success { background: rgba(94, 140, 111, 0.10); border-color: rgba(94, 140, 111, 0.30); color: #5e8c6f; } .ds-toast--error { background: rgba(207, 90, 82, 0.10); border-color: rgba(207, 90, 82, 0.30); color: #cf5a52; } .ds-toast--warning { background: rgba(214, 168, 90, 0.10); border-color: rgba(214, 168, 90, 0.30); color: #d6a85a; } .ds-toast--info { background: #231d1a; border-color: rgba(236, 229, 214, 0.16); color: #c4baa6; } .ds-toast-dismiss { flex-shrink: 0; opacity: 0.7; color: currentColor; background: transparent; border: 0; cursor: pointer; } .ds-toast-dismiss:hover { opacity: 1; }

narrative.overview:
A carrel is the private study desk in a university library: a small wooden booth with a green-shaded reading lamp, surrounded by silence and the spines of borrowed books. Eduh is what that carrel looks like when a Unicamp student logs in to study at 11pm the night before a P1. Warm, dim, focused, structured by the rhythm of reading.

The room is built from three materials. Warm-dark wood-tone surfaces (deep, slightly red-brown, never charcoal-cool) for the page and desk. Warm-cream paper-tone text (off-white shifted toward old-page yellow, never pure white). And a single quiet color of authority, oxblood, the leather binding of the textbook resting on the desk. Focus is shown through precise oxblood borders and hairlines. The page may carry a nearly invisible fixed lamp wash from oxblood and brass radial gradients, but the effect stays below the threshold of decoration.

Type does the academic work. Newsreader serif sets every heading, every topic title, every paragraph the AI hands back to you. Inter sans handles UI chrome cleanly and unobtrusively. JetBrains Mono appears only for code and KaTeX. Hairline cream rules separate sections of the page the way a chapter rule separates chapters of a book.
keyCharacteristics: Warm-dark only. Background is oklch(0.155 0.008 30), a deep warm sepia near-black, with only a low-opacity lamp wash. No pure or cool charcoal.
Single chromatic voice: oxblood (oklch(0.46 0.13 20)), used on under 10% of any visible screen.
Newsreader serif for long-form and structural type, Inter for UI chrome, JetBrains Mono for code.
Hairline cream rules at structural breaks. Otherwise borderless surface separation by tonal layering.
Focus states use a restrained oxblood border glow.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Oxblood is the only chromatic action color. Status colors (forest, rust, brass) communicate state, not interaction. If you find yourself reaching for forest or brass on a button, the system has lost its voice.

rules.name: The No-White Rule
rules.body: Pure #ffffff and pure #000000 are forbidden. All neutrals carry the warm hue. Page-cream replaces white. Lamp-night replaces black.

rules.name: The Cool-Code Rule
rules.body: The neutral-grey code surface is the only cool note in the palette. Cool tones must not leak anywhere else.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Newsreader for content the AI gives the student (explanations, examples, worked solutions, topic titles, plan headings). Inter for the affordances the student uses to navigate (buttons, inputs, navbar, breadcrumbs, dashboard chrome). Mixing the two breaks the voice.

rules.name: The 75ch Rule
rules.body: Body prose is capped at 75ch (~640px at 16px). Wider lines fatigue tired students faster than any other typography failure.

rules.name: The No-Gradient-Type Rule
rules.body: No background-clip: text. The previous Eduh wordmark with a page-cream-to-blue gradient is retired. Solid page-cream Newsreader.

rules.name: The Focus Edge Rule
rules.body: Inputs, textareas, auth forms, and chat composers use a border-color shift plus a small oxblood glow that stays tight to the component edge.

rules.name: The No-Lift Rule
rules.body: Cards do not raise off the page on hover. Hover changes the background (desk-surface to desk-surface-hover) and may bring an oxblood-tinted hairline. It does not add translate-y or scale. A small shadow-sm or shadow-md appears in a few current emphasis surfaces, but it is transitional drift, not a pattern to extend.

dos: Do use Newsreader for all AI-authored prose, all topic titles, and all plan headings. Inter for everything the user clicks, types, or navigates. JetBrains Mono only for code and KaTeX.
Do use the restrained Input Focus Glow for text inputs, textareas, and chat composers. Focus should be visible at the border and quiet everywhere else.
Do use Hairline rules at structural breaks, under section and topic headings, between chat messages and the input, between plan items.
Do keep oxblood under 10% of any visible screen. It is the binding of the book, not the cover.
Do warm-shift any new status color into the palette's hue family (10-80, or olive 140-155).
Do test layouts with real Brazilian Portuguese strings; pt-BR runs 15-25% longer than English.
donts: Don't revive the Gemini-clone palette. No #131314 charcoal, no #A2C7FF pastel blue.
Don't use pure #ffffff text or #000000 background anywhere. Page-cream replaces white. Lamp-night replaces black.
Don't use side-stripe borders (a border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent).
Don't use gradient text. Solid page-cream Newsreader for the wordmark.
Don't add EdTech-cliché motifs: streaks, achievement badges, mascots, confetti, cartoon illustrations, kid-friendly saturated palettes.
Don't drift into ChatGPT / Claude / Gemini lookalike. The plan and topic timeline must visibly anchor every authenticated screen.
Don't add ambient micro-animations. Motion confirms state changes only.
Don't use modals as a first thought. Inline disclosure, progressive forms, and contextual panels come first.
Don't use bright syntax-highlighting themes (Dracula, Synthwave, Monokai).
Don't use cards as the lazy answer to every grouping.
Don't use em dashes in copy.
